personalInfo.name: Chris Saju Mulakkal
personalInfo.summary: A high-achieving individual and Officer Cadet with strong leadership capabilities and a deep commitment to community service. Proven track record in managing large-scale cultural events, leading teams in high-pressure environments, and contributing to social innovation.

featuredProject.title: ML Regression Engine
featuredProject.description: An end-to-end machine learning platform engineered to perform automated regression analysis on diverse, user-provided datasets. The engine features a dynamic processing pipeline that adapts to various inputs—from industrial logs to financial metrics—to deliver high-precision forecasting models. By bridging complex statistical frameworks with an intuitive interface, the tool empowers users to derive actionable insights from any structured data source.

coreCompetencies.name: Strategic Leadership
coreCompetencies.desc: Selected for Officer Cadet School (OCS) based on leadership merit and performance.

coreCompetencies.name: Logistics & Operations
coreCompetencies.desc: Managed complex scheduling and equipment for major college events.

coreCompetencies.name: Cultural Advocacy
coreCompetencies.desc: Represented Indian culture through drama and exchange programs.

coreCompetencies.name: Peer Mentorship
coreCompetencies.desc: Guided junior cricketers and supported classmates as Physics Rep.

coreCompetencies.name: Resilience & Adaptability
coreCompetencies.desc: Transformed training setbacks into performance gains on the field.

integratedProgramme.programDescription: A six-year integrated pathway for high-ability learners, focusing on 21st-century competencies and social innovation.

certificates: Victoria-Cedar Alliance Integrated Programme Graduation Certificate

highlights: Selected for the Officer Cadet Course, representing the top tier of National Servicemen based on leadership potential and performance during BMT (Jan to Mar 2026).
Undergoing intensive command training at Officer Cadet School (OCS) to lead and manage platoon-sized elements.
Developing transferable skills in strategic planning, crisis management, and high-pressure decision-making.
Directed 'ICS Night 2025', managing a team of sixty participants.
Coordinated complex logistics and navigated interpersonal dynamics for large-scale performances.
Contributed to Taiwan Cultural Exchange Programme and Racial Harmony Day showcases.
Acted as a liaison between students and teachers to support academic needs.
Fostered a collaborative learning environment within the classroom.

communityService.contribution: Applied sales skills and business acumen to raise funds for children with critical illnesses.

communityService.beneficiary: Geylang East Home for the Aged
communityService.contribution: Engaged with elderly residents with memory loss or hearing difficulties, demonstrating patience and empathy.

highlights: Demonstrated resilience through intensive training after a challenging 2024 season.
Mentored junior players and adapted to crucial team positions in 2025.
